name: @onderling/calendar-emission
description: iCal read/write substrate.  Lifted from apps/tasks-v0/src/calendar/ on 2026-05-23 (canopy-chat v0.7.11 — calendar app needed the same .ics emitter + busy-interval reader that tasks-v0 already had).  Two consumers now: tasks-v0 (free-busy + per-member calendar emission for task deadlines) and @onderling-app/calendar (event CRUD with .ics output to pod).
